DetachEniInstance.eniId: The ID of the elastic network interface
DetachEniInstance.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of no more than 64 characters. For details, see [ClientToken Idempotency Support](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
DetachEniInstance.instanceId: The ID of the cloud product instance to be detached
